content:
# Best Free AI Tools for Students on a Budget 2026

Being a student doesn't mean you can't access powerful AI tools. Here's the best free AI for students!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more free tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] Free: Writing Help

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] offers 10,000 characters per month for free — perfect for essays, emails, and assignments!

### Rytr Free for Students
- **10,000 characters/month**: About 1,500 words
- **50+ templates**: For every type of assignment
- **30+ languages**: Helpful for language students

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## ChatGPT Free: Your AI Tutor

ChatGPT is like having a tutor available 24/7, completely free!

### ChatGPT for Students
- **Explain anything**: Complex concepts made simple
- **Practice questions**: Generate quizzes for studying
- **Writing feedback**: Get suggestions on your essays

---

## GitHub Copilot: Free for Students

[[link:/tools/7|GitHub Copilot]] is completely free for students and educators!

### Copilot for Coding Students
- **Code suggestions**: Learn by seeing examples
- **All major languages**: Python, JavaScript, and more
- **IDE integration**: Works in VS Code, JetBrains, and more

---

Ready to study smarter with AI? Start with these free tools today!
